mapper.select: SELECT id, reader_id, title, content, type, is_read, create_time FROM notification WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, reader_id, title, content, type, is_read, create_time FROM notification WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (reader_id, title, content, type, is_read) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (reader_id, title, content, type, is_read) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead})
